description: memory-access offset folding: object/array/string/typed-array reads+writes at many static offsets, plus heap-header (negative-offset) paths via typeof/string concat. Guards the wasm32 load/store lowering that folds non-negative offsets into the memarg immediate (and keeps the i64.add path for negative offsets). Output identical native vs wasm.

nums 55
nested 42 deep 7
typed 10,20,30,40 sum 100
ab-cd-ef xyz
types number string boolean object function undefined
bytes 255 0 128
fields ok
